name: B.5: Lineage Queries and Lifecycle Enforcement
description: Tests the registry control plane's lineage queries (forward/reverse) and lifecycle enforcement on DELETE. A prod agent depends on search:1.*, which blocks deletion of the only 1.x version — until a replacement is registered.

cases.name: reverse lineage: which agents depend on search:1.0.0?
cases.description: Query returns research-agent (prod) because its dependency range 1.* matches 1.0.0.

cases.name: DELETE search:1.0.0 is blocked by prod dependent
cases.description: research-agent (prod) depends on search:1.* and no other 1.x version exists. DELETE must be rejected with dependent details.

cases.name: register search:1.1.0, then DELETE search:1.0.0 succeeds
cases.description: After registering search:1.1.0, the range search:1.* is still satisfiable. DELETE of 1.0.0 now succeeds.

cases.name: forward lineage: what tools does research-agent depend on?
cases.description: Returns search with versionRange 1.* and resolvedVersions [1.0.0] (or [1.0.0, 1.1.0] after the new version is registered).

cases.name: DELETE search:2.0.0 warns about stage dependent
cases.description: test-agent (stage) depends on search:2.0.0. DELETE should succeed with a warning, not block.
